---
description: Commenting rules based on TechTarget best practices
applyTo: "**"
---

1. Explain Why, Not What: Provide context and intent behind the implementation, not a restatement of what the code does.
2. Be Non-duplicative: Add value beyond what code communicates.
3. Clarify, Do Not Confuse: Use clear, precise language.
4. Keep Comments Brief: If comments are extensive, refactor code instead.
5. Explain Non-obvious Code: Focus on edge cases, workarounds, or business logic.
